title: cestrum diurnum var. tinctorium
intro: Cestrum diurnum var. tinctorium, also known as the golden chalice vine, is a type of flowering vine native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cestrum diurnum var. tinctorium include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and even show promise in treating certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions or tinctures made from its leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or added to other herbal remedies.
